sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (MFA) MFA Financial, Inc. Reports Q4 Net Interest Income $55.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $64.3M
feed.summary: MFA Financial, Inc. reported its Q4 net interest income at $55.5 million, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $64.3 million. The company's Q4 non-GAAP earnings also fell, despite a rise in net interest income. MFA Financial is a specialized REIT investing in residential mortgage loans and securities.

feed.title: 5 Top-Ranked Retail Apparel and Shoe Stocks for a Stable Portfolio
feed.summary: The Retail – Apparel and Shoes industry is performing stably in 2026, driven by value-conscious consumers and fast-moving trends. This article highlights five top-ranked stocks with a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) that are recommended for a stable portfolio: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (DECK), On Holding AG (ONON), Tapestry Inc. (TPR), American Eagle Outfitters Inc. (AEO), and FIGS Inc. (FIGS). Each company's recent performance, growth drivers, and financial outlook are discussed.

feed.title: TRACTOR SUPPLY ANNOUNCES A FLOCK OF ANIMAL-FRIENDLY FESTIVITIES LAUNCHING THIS MONTH
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is launching a series of animal-focused events in February, including their annual Chick Days and the new Animal Days. These events offer savings, supplies, adoptions, and in-store activities for pet parents and animal owners, culminating in a nationwide "Farm Bash" celebration on February 21st. The aim is to celebrate the role animals play in "Life Out Here" and provide resources for their care.

feed.title: How CVS Health is supporting heart health through prevention and chronic management
feed.summary: CVS Health is addressing heart disease, the leading cause of death in the U.S., through a multi-faceted approach focusing on prevention, early detection, and chronic management. Their services include convenient preventive screenings, personalized weight loss and lifestyle support, and specialized care coordination through MinuteClinic, Oak Street Health, and Signify Health. The company aims to make heart health initiatives more accessible to Americans.

feed.title: News | AJ Capital seeks $90 million Cambridge Graduate Hotel sale
feed.summary: AJ Capital Partners is looking to sell its 148-room Graduate by Hilton Cambridge hotel for an expected guide price of over £60 million ($81.44 million) to £65 million ($88.23 million). This is one of only two international properties owned by AJ Capital, which founded the Graduate brand in 2014 and sold it to Hilton in March 2024. The hotel on the River Cam was acquired in 2019 and renovated in 2021, and it is managed by Schulte Hospitality Group.

feed.title: EQT Analyst Rating: Stephens & Co. Raises Price Target to $71.00
feed.summary: Stephens & Co. has reiterated its "Overweight" rating for EQT, an independent natural gas production company, and increased its price target from $70.00 to $71.00. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company shares amidst consistent analyst attention. EQT focuses its operations in the Marcellus and Utica shales, serving marketers, utilities, and industrial operators in the Appalachian Basin.

feed.title: David Yurman Sues TJX in Copyright Test Over Jewelry “Dupes”
feed.summary: David Yurman has filed a lawsuit against TJX Companies, alleging that the retailer is selling "virtually indistinguishable" jewelry that copies its federally registered cable designs. The luxury brand claims TJX is profiting from the "dupe economy" and knowingly imitates its copyrighted designs. This case could be a significant test of how copyright law can be used by luxury brands to combat the growing market for "dupes."

feed.title: AT&T (T) Network Powers Sezzle's New Mobile Plan Launch
feed.summary: Sezzle has launched Sezzle Mobile, an unlimited mobile phone plan starting at $29.99 monthly, which operates using AT&T's network infrastructure. While AT&T shows strong profitability and institutional ownership, the company's financial health presents a complex picture with significant leverage and potential financial distress signals. These factors, alongside high valuation metrics, suggest investors should exercise careful consideration.

feed.title: Progressive (PGR) Reports Increase in January Net Premiums Writt
feed.summary: Progressive (PGR) reported a significant increase in net premiums written to $6.74 billion and net premiums earned to $6.92 billion for January. The company projects a rise in GAAP EPS to $1.98, while pretax net realized gains on securities are expected to decline by 6%. Despite some insider selling, Progressive's financial health is strong with robust revenue growth, a healthy balance sheet, and attractive valuation metrics, suggesting a stable outlook for the leading auto insurer.

feed.title: Labcorp Hldgs (LH) Target Price Raised by Baird to $326 | LH Sto
feed.summary: Baird has raised its target price for Labcorp Holdings (LH) to $326 from $313, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating continued positive sentiment. This adjustment follows several other analysts who have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for Labcorp in recent months. Labcorp, one of the largest independent clinical laboratories in the U.S., offers a wide range of clinical lab tests.

feed.title: Baird Raises Price Target for CarMax (KMX) to $48 | KMX Stock Ne
feed.summary: Baird has reaffirmed its "Outperform" rating for CarMax (KMX) and increased the price target from $44 to $48, reflecting a positive outlook on the company's future performance. This adjustment follows several recent analyst ratings for CarMax, with both increases and decreases in price targets. CarMax, the largest used-vehicle retailer in the US, aims to expand its market share beyond the current estimated 3.7% of vehicles 0-10 years old.

feed.title: F5 and Scality expand partnership to deliver secure, high-performance data infrastructure for AI workloads
feed.summary: F5 and Scality have deepened their partnership to provide secure, high-performance data infrastructure tailored for AI workloads. This collaboration integrates F5's Application Delivery and Security Platform with Scality's S3-compatible object storage, enhancing data access, resilience, and security across various environments. The joint solution aims to address the demanding data requirements of enterprise AI by eliminating performance bottlenecks, ensuring scalability, and safeguarding sensitive data.

feed.title: Fortinet (FTNT) Stock Slides as Analyst Downgrades on Valuation Concerns
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) stock declined after Freedom Capital Markets downgraded it from Buy to Hold due to valuation concerns, despite the company reporting strong Q4 2025 results with significant product revenue and billings growth. While other analysts remain bullish and raised price targets, potential risks such as rising memory prices, currency volatility, and increased competition, along with a high P/E ratio, contributed to the downgrade.

feed.title: Carmax To Rally Around 14%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
feed.summary: This article compiles

feed.title: Verizon vs Johnson & Johnson: Which Dividend Hike Winner Is the Better Buy?
feed.summary: Verizon (VZ) and Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) recently increased their dividends, but offer different investment profiles. Verizon provides a higher current yield of 5.8% but carries substantial debt and has slower dividend growth. Johnson & Johnson has a lower 2.1% yield but boasts a much longer track record of dividend increases and stronger growth prospects due to its healthcare business.

feed.title: Mass Team With $682M Joins Raymond James
feed.summary: A Massachusetts-based team, Touchpoint Financial Advisor Group, managing $682 million in client assets, has joined Raymond James' independent advisor channel. This team, comprising six advisors and three support staff, previously worked at Commonwealth, which was acquired by LPL Financial. This move marks the second departure of a Commonwealth team to Raymond James this month, highlighting ongoing transitions following LPL's acquisition.

feed.title: Pre-market: ROK Rockwell Automation (NYSE) $388.47 Feb 18, 2026: AI software momentum
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) opened pre-market at $388.47, down 1.50%, following a strong Q1 earnings beat ($2.75 EPS) but mixed technical signals. The company reiterated its FY26 guidance, and investor focus is on the growth of its software and AI-enabled digital twin offerings in the industrial sector, driving interest despite a premium valuation. Meyka AI gives ROK a B+ (BUY) rating, projecting a short-term upside to $430.61, but a potential downside to $356.31 over a year.

feed.title: Slowdown in Its Small Business POS Platform Weighed on Fiserv's (FISV) Shares
feed.summary: The London Company Large Cap Strategy disclosed that it sold its position in Fiserv, Inc. (FISV) after the company experienced a slowdown in its small business POS platform and weak Q3 results, leading to a steep guidance cut and management changes. The investment firm cited a loss of credibility and increased doubts about Fiserv's long-term growth outlook. Despite Fiserv not being on the list of 30 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds, the firm suggests that other AI stocks offer greater upside potential.

feed.title: Waycross Partners LLC Acquires 25,000 Shares of Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Waycross Partners LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 50%, purchasing an additional 25,000 shares to hold a total of 75,000 shares valued at approximately $3.87 million. Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.98 and a 12.3% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with a price target of $60.30.

feed.title: Syon Capital LLC Raises Holdings in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Syon Capital LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 13.2% in the third quarter, holding 90,258 shares valued at $4.66 million. Bank of America reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing a 12.3% revenue increase year-over-year. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $60.30.

feed.title: Amcor, university teaming up to give students real-world experience
feed.summary: Amcor and the University of Southern Indiana are collaborating to provide students with practical experience in packaging design. This partnership aims to give students real-world exposure to the industry, enhancing their educational journey. The article highlights how companies are engaging with academia to bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and practical application.

feed.title: Micron Technology's Stock Soars 250% Amid AI Demand Surge
feed.summary: Micron Technology's stock has surged 250% since September, driven by escalating demand for high bandwidth memory (HBM) for AI and a shortage of DRAM memory chips, leading to significant price increases and expanded gross margins. Analysts have raised earnings expectations, with the company planning to invest $20 billion in capital expenditures for fiscal 2026 to further capitalize on AI growth. Despite potential industry cyclicality, market confidence remains strong, with discussions around Micron potentially reaching a $1 trillion valuation.

feed.title: Chaos on Delta flight as passenger tries to breach cockpit at major airport
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines flight from Houston to Atlanta was delayed after a passenger allegedly attempted to breach the cockpit moments before takeoff. Houston Police officers responded, removed the individual from the plane, and the person is believed to be experiencing a mental health issue. No injuries were reported, and the flight departed approximately two hours later.

feed.title: Chubb Limited (CB) Hit All-Time High in Q4
feed.summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) reached an all-time high in Q4 2025, driven by exceptional earnings, record core operating income, and robust investment income growth, as highlighted by The London Company Large Cap Strategy. The company's diversified portfolio and disciplined underwriting reinforced investor confidence. Despite its strong performance, the article suggests that certain AI stocks may offer greater upside potential with less downside risk.

feed.title: From diagnosis to ringing the bell
feed.summary: The article shares the story of Alex, a child who overcame a rare rhabdoid tumor after two years of treatment at the Aflac Cancer and Blood Disorders Center. His journey highlights Aflac's long-standing commitment to supporting children with cancer and blood disorders, evidenced by over $195 million in donations since 1995 to the center. These contributions fund lifesaving research, providing hope for children like Alex.

feed.title: ZBH Investor Alert: Hagens Berman Investigates Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Over Alleged Emerging Market Failures and "Inconsistent" Execution
feed.summary: Hagens Berman is investigating Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (ZBH) following concerns about the reasonable basis for its 2025 revenue targets. The investigation focuses on whether ZBH senior management misled investors regarding the stability of its international business, particularly after assurances of "very high" confidence in growth were followed by disclosures of distributor order cancellations in emerging markets and a significant revenue miss, leading to a 15% stock drop. The firm is urging investors who suffered losses to report them for a potential securities class action lawsuit.

feed.title: Is Deere Stock (DE) a Buy Ahead of Q1 Earnings?
feed.summary: Deere (DE) is set to report its Q1 earnings this week, with its stock up 29% this year due to its focus on AI and automation. Wall Street expects a 39.8% year-on-year fall in earnings per share to $1.92, despite a projected 11.7% increase in revenues to $7.6 billion. Analysts anticipate headwinds from weak farmer spending, low commodity prices, and high production expenses, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a potential 14.41% downside from the current consensus price target.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Raises Bid to Increase Its American Production Capacity
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics has increased its bid to acquire BlueScope Steel’s North Star mill in Ohio, indicating a strong desire to expand its American production capacity. This move comes amidst rising steel and aluminum prices, influenced by President Donald Trump’s tariffs. The acquisition aims to capitalize on market conditions and bolster domestic steel output.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) reported strong Q4 2025 results, beating earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.76 against an anticipated $1.62. The company highlighted robust revenue growth, significant adjusted EBITDA expansion, and increased adjusted free cash flow, attributing success to its resilient business model and differentiating capabilities. Executives discussed ongoing investments in digital and sustainability initiatives, including polymer centers, renewable natural gas projects, and fleet electrification, while also providing guidance for continued profitable growth in 2026 despite some macroeconomic headwinds and non-recurring projects from the previous year.

feed.title: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Public Storage announced its Q4 2025 earnings and unveiled "PS4.0," a new strategic vision focusing on enhanced customer experience, optimized capital allocation, and a performance-driven culture. Leadership changes include Tom Boyle's promotion to CEO and Joe Fisher joining as President and CFO. The company delivered a core FFO of $4.26 per share for the quarter and $16.97 for the full year, while projecting a slight FFO decline for 2026 due to same-store NOI trends and refinancing activities, offset by non-same-store growth.

feed.title: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Medtronic plc reported strong Q3 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with 6% organic revenue growth and EPS of $1.36. The company highlighted significant progress in its four generational growth drivers: PFA platform for AFib, Symplicity Spyral for hypertension, Altaviva for urinary incontinence, and the Hugo surgical robot. Medtronic reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 organic revenue growth guidance of approximately 5.5% and committed to high single-digit EPS growth for fiscal year 2027, driven by accelerated growth and strategic investments.

feed.title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, exceeding earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.76 against an anticipated $2.57. Despite challenges like a government shutdown, the company achieved solid revenue, increased EBITDA margin, and robust free cash flow. Leidos outlined its North Star 2030 strategy, focusing on strategic acquisitions, organic investments in growth pillars like cyber and energy, and organizational realignment to drive future advancements and profitability.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Dealer Services Acquires Assets of American Adventure Insurance
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Dealer Services, a division of Brown & Brown, Inc., has acquired the assets of American Adventure Insurance. This acquisition expands Brown & Brown Dealer Services' capabilities in providing specialized insurance solutions and finance and insurance products for a diverse range of vehicles at the dealership level. Paul Bender, American Adventure's owner with over 30 years of experience, and his team will join Brown & Brown Dealer Services, continuing to operate nationwide.

feed.title: Examining the Future: TechnipFMC's Earnings Outlook
feed.summary: TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) is set to release its quarterly earnings, with analysts projecting an EPS of $0.51. The market is closely watching for potential beats and strong future guidance, which significantly impact stock prices. The company's shares have risen by 101.02% over the past 52 weeks, suggesting a bullish sentiment among long-term shareholders ahead of the earnings report.

feed.title: A Look at Newmont's Upcoming Earnings Report
feed.summary: Newmont (NYSE: NEM) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.94 for the mining company. Investors will be looking for Newmont to surpass these estimates and provide positive guidance for the upcoming quarter, as stock prices can be significantly influenced by company guidance.

feed.title: Exploring Alliant Energy's Earnings Expectations
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026, with analysts anticipating an EPS of $0.58. The company's stock has shown positive performance, climbing 15.38% over the last 52 weeks, trading at $71.1 as of February 16. Investors are closely watching the announcement for guidance on future performance, as past earnings results have impacted share prices.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Quanta Services
feed.summary: Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Analysts project an EPS of $2.92, and investors are eager for the company to surpass these estimates and provide positive guidance. The company's shares are up 86.77% over the last 52 weeks, trading at $525.13 as of February 17.

feed.title: P/E Ratio Insights for DexCom
feed.summary: DexCom Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM) is trading at $70.52, up 0.13% in the current session, but has seen a 2.33% decrease in the past month and a 21.17% decrease over the past year. The company's P/E ratio of 33.7 is lower than the industry aggregate of 42.66 for Health Care Equipment & Supplies, which could suggest the stock is undervalued or that shareholders expect lower future performance compared to its peers. Investors are advised to consider the P/E ratio alongside other financial metrics and qualitative analysis for informed decision-making.

feed.title: Contact Levi & Korsinsky by April 13, 2026 Deadline to Join Class Action Against Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD)
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action securities lawsuit against Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) on behalf of investors who suffered losses due to alleged securities fraud between August 7, 2024, and February 9, 2026. The lawsuit claims Kyndryl made false statements, had inadequate internal controls, and would be unable to timely file its Q4 2025 financial report. Investors have until April 13, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Largest UK membrane bioreactor plant to use DuPont tech at Wigan site
feed.summary: DuPont has secured a contract to supply its MemCor™ MBR membrane bioreactor systems for wastewater treatment expansions at three United Utilities sites in the North West of England: Eccles, Salford, and Wigan. The Wigan plant, serving over 437,000 people, is set to become the largest MBR plant in the UK, aiming to meet stricter discharge standards and enhance effluent quality. This initiative highlights DuPont's focus on advanced water technologies and United Utilities' commitment to improving wastewater infrastructure.

feed.title: Kodiak AI Appoints Chet Gryczan to Lead Its Defense Vertical
feed.summary: Kodiak AI, Inc. has appointed Chet Gryczan as Vice President and Managing Director of Defense to lead its defense vertical. Gryczan brings over two decades of experience in the defense and automotive sectors, including scaling Detroit Defense to a $157 million annual revenue enterprise. His role will focus on integrating Kodiak's AI-powered autonomous driving system, the Kodiak Driver, into military vehicles and expanding the company's defense market presence.

feed.title: Exec who helped win $500M Army deal now steering Kodiak’s military AI trucks
feed.summary: Kodiak AI (KDK) has appointed Chet Gryczan as Vice President and Managing Director of Defense, aiming to expand its presence in the military sector. Gryczan, with over 20 years of experience, previously scaled Detroit Defense to $157 million in revenue and was instrumental in securing a $500 million Congressional modernization program. His role will involve integrating Kodiak's autonomous driving system, the Kodiak Driver, into military vehicles, building on existing defense contracts with the U.S. Army and Marine Corps.

feed.title: Bank of America Launches Art Consulting Service
feed.summary: Bank of America Private Bank has launched a new Art Consulting service to provide clients with unbiased guidance for navigating the art market, which increasingly plays a role in wealth strategy. The service offers tailored experiences, historical context, market dynamics, and access to the broader art world, complementing existing art services. This initiative aims to help clients create and manage art collections that align with their vision, values, and financial goals.

feed.title: Why Bank of America now offers art advice as part of your wealth plan
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) has introduced an Art Consulting service through its Private Bank and Merrill divisions to assist clients in navigating the art market. This service offers tailored advice, market research, and access to art events, complementing existing art-related financial services. The initiative addresses the growing trend of clients viewing art as both a cultural and financial asset within their wealth management strategies.

feed.title: World Labs lands $200M from Autodesk to bring world models into 3D workflows
feed.summary: World Labs, founded by Fei-Fei Li, secured a $200 million investment from Autodesk to integrate its AI-powered 3D environment generation models into Autodesk's design tools. This partnership aims to enhance 3D workflows, particularly in the entertainment sector, by combining World Labs' spatial AI capabilities with Autodesk's CAD software. The deal comes as World Labs is reportedly negotiating a new funding round at a $5 billion valuation.

feed.title: Verizon to speak at Barclays Communications and Content Symposium on February 24
feed.summary: Tony Skiadas, Verizon's executive vice president and chief financial officer, is scheduled to speak at the Barclays Communications and Content Symposium on Tuesday, February 24, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The session will be webcast and accessible via Verizon's Investor Relations website. Verizon, headquartered in New York City, generated revenues of $138.2 billion in 2025.

feed.title: Travelers Launches Industry-Leading Agentic AI Claim Assistant Developed with OpenAI
feed.summary: Travelers has launched an industry-leading AI Claim Assistant, developed with OpenAI, to enhance the customer experience for filing claims. This agentic intelligent voice service uses advanced language and speech recognition to handle customer calls, initially for auto damage claims with plans to expand. The solution aims to deliver superior customer outcomes through efficient processes, supported by positive early feedback and a focus on upskilling employees into more strategic roles.

feed.title: Synchrony and Planet DDS Expand Strategic Partnership to Integrate CareCredit Across Leading Dental Practice Management Platforms – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Synchrony and Planet DDS have expanded their strategic partnership, making CareCredit the preferred patient financing solution across all Planet DDS platforms, including Denticon and Cloud 9. This integration will allow dental and orthodontic practices to embed CareCredit financing directly into their workflows, simplifying financial conversations and enhancing patient access to care. The partnership aims to improve operational efficiency for practices and provide patients with easier access to flexible financing options, building on an existing relationship from 2020.

feed.title: Oracle Offers New Capabilities in Supply Chain and Manufacturing
feed.summary: Oracle has introduced new capabilities in its Fusion Cloud Supply Chain & Manufacturing (SCM) suite, specifically targeting the unique requirements of process manufacturing. These innovations aim to help organizations, especially those in regulated industries like life sciences and food and beverage, improve real-time production visibility, adapt to changing production conditions, and meet regulatory needs by integrating formulas, recipes, and batch execution in a unified cloud solution. The updates include streamlined recipe and yield management, flexible batch manufacturing execution, connected process execution, and advanced materials traceability and control.

feed.title: Pathlock Announces Integration with ServiceNow to Embed Risk-Aware Access Governance into Enterprise Workflows
feed.summary: Pathlock has announced an integration with ServiceNow to embed risk-aware access governance directly into enterprise workflows. This collaboration will enhance ServiceNow's access request experience by providing fine-grained access risk insights and compliant provisioning. The integration allows for automated Segregation of Duties (SoD) analysis and sensitive-access checks within ServiceNow's approval flows, streamlining compliance and ensuring audit readiness.
